response:
VERDICT: TAMPERED  
ROUND: 0  
REASONING:  In round 0 the first operation that links two independently-listed values is the addition “step1 = h + S1”.  
• From the binary given for h (L0069) we get 0x5BE0CD19.  
• From the binary given for S1 (L0070) we get 0x3587272B.  
• Adding them modulo 2³² should give 0x5BE0CD19 + 0x3587272B = 0x9147F44E.  
• The trace, however, lists step1 (L0072) as 0x9167F444 (binary 1001 0001 0110 0111 1111 0100 0100 0100).  
The result in the trace differs from the correct sum by 0x0020FFF6, which cannot be explained by carry mistakes and shows that at least one bit of S1 or step1 has been altered.  Because every later value is derived from this wrong step1, the tamper necessarily starts in round 0.
